revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Trivia section/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia section/doc]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Trivia section/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia section/doc]][[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Trivia section/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia section/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Trivia section/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia section/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Trivia section/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Trivia section/doc]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template sorts articles into [[:Category:Articles with trivia sections]]. {{Substitution|only|if you want it to be automatically dated}} == Placement == Editors should '''not''' use this template to tag sections they consider trivial (i.e., which topically address something the editor does not think should be covered). In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists. == Usage == To help with the categorization of articles, please use the optional date parameter, e.g. {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}. Sections tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]]. The simplest way to add this template to an article section is to copy and paste {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ===Optional parameters=== * '''{{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}'''   Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter. You can use {{para|date|{{subst:DATE}}}} as a shorthand to enter this parameter. Articles tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]], but it may not reflect the correct month of tagging. * '''{{para|to}}'''   Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material, e.g.: {{para|to|#Filmography}} or {{para|to|Nocturnal underwater basketweaving#Techniques}}. If the '''{{para|small}}''' option is turned on, this information does not display, but may still be useful to editors. * '''{{para|small|y}}'''   If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner. Requires explicit definition of the template as applying not to the entire article: {{tnull|trivia|sect{{=}}y|small{{=}}y}} or {{tnull|trivia|table|small{{=}}yes}} or {{tnull|trivia|section{{=}}"In popular culture" material|small{{=}}1}} == Template Data == { "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter.", "type": "unknown", "default": "May 2025", "required": true }, "to": { "label": "Suggested relocation destination", "description": "Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner." } }, "description": "In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists.", "format": "inline" } == Closely related templates == {{Trivia templates see-also}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essay|Essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – Essay on "popular culture"-types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – Wikiproject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[:en:Template:Example farm|Template:Example farm]] – For articles or sections with too many examples * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – Index of cleanup templates {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template sorts articles into [[:Category:Articles with trivia sections]]. {{Substitution|only|if you want it to be automatically dated}} == Placement == Editors should '''not''' use this template to tag sections they consider trivial (i.e., which topically address something the editor does not think should be covered). In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists. == Usage == To help with the categorization of articles, please use the optional date parameter, e.g. {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}. Sections tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]]. The simplest way to add this template to an article section is to copy and paste {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ===Optional parameters=== * '''{{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}'''   Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter. You can use {{para|date|{{subst:DATE}}}} as a shorthand to enter this parameter. Articles tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]], but it may not reflect the correct month of tagging. * '''{{para|to}}'''   Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material, e.g.: {{para|to|#Filmography}} or {{para|to|Nocturnal underwater basketweaving#Techniques}}. If the '''{{para|small}}''' option is turned on, this information does not display, but may still be useful to editors. * '''{{para|small|y}}'''   If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner. Requires explicit definition of the template as applying not to the entire article: {{tnull|trivia|sect{{=}}y|small{{=}}y}} or {{tnull|trivia|table|small{{=}}yes}} or {{tnull|trivia|section{{=}}"In popular culture" material|small{{=}}1}} == Template Data == { "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter.", "type": "unknown", "default": "May 2025", "required": true }, "to": { "label": "Suggested relocation destination", "description": "Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner." } }, "description": "In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists.", "format": "inline" } == Closely related templates == {{Trivia templates see-also}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essay|Essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – Essay on "popular culture"-types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – Wikiproject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[:en:Template:Example farm|Template:Example farm]] – For articles or sections with too many examples * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – Index of cleanup templates {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template sorts articles into [[:Category:Articles with trivia sections]]. {{Substitution|only|if you want it to be automatically dated}} == Placement == Editors should '''not''' use this template to tag sections they consider trivial (i.e., which topically address something the editor does not think should be covered). In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists. == Usage == To help with the categorization of articles, please use the optional date parameter, e.g. {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}. Sections tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]]. The simplest way to add this template to an article section is to copy and paste {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ===Optional parameters=== * '''{{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}'''   Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter. You can use {{para|date|{{subst:DATE}}}} as a shorthand to enter this parameter. Articles tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]], but it may not reflect the correct month of tagging. * '''{{para|to}}'''   Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material, e.g.: {{para|to|#Filmography}} or {{para|to|Nocturnal underwater basketweaving#Techniques}}. If the '''{{para|small}}''' option is turned on, this information does not display, but may still be useful to editors. * '''{{para|small|y}}'''   If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner. Requires explicit definition of the template as applying not to the entire article: {{tnull|trivia|sect{{=}}y|small{{=}}y}} or {{tnull|trivia|table|small{{=}}yes}} or {{tnull|trivia|section{{=}}"In popular culture" material|small{{=}}1}} == Template Data == { "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter.", "type": "unknown", "default": "May 2025", "required": true }, "to": { "label": "Suggested relocation destination", "description": "Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner." } }, "description": "In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists.", "format": "inline" } == Closely related templates == {{Trivia templates see-also}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essay|Essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – Essay on "popular culture"-types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – Wikiproject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[:en:Template:Example farm|Template:Example farm]] – For articles or sections with too many examples * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – Index of cleanup templates {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} This template sorts articles into [[:Category:Articles with trivia sections]]. {{Substitution|only|if you want it to be automatically dated}} == Placement == Editors should '''not''' use this template to tag sections they consider trivial (i.e., which topically address something the editor does not think should be covered). In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists. == Usage == To help with the categorization of articles, please use the optional date parameter, e.g. {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}. Sections tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]]. The simplest way to add this template to an article section is to copy and paste {{trivia section|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} ===Optional parameters=== * '''{{para|date|{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}'''   Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter. You can use {{para|date|{{subst:DATE}}}} as a shorthand to enter this parameter. Articles tagged with this template without the parameter will eventually be given the parameter by a [[Wikipedia:Bots|bot]], but it may not reflect the correct month of tagging. * '''{{para|to}}'''   Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material, e.g.: {{para|to|#Filmography}} or {{para|to|Nocturnal underwater basketweaving#Techniques}}. If the '''{{para|small}}''' option is turned on, this information does not display, but may still be useful to editors. * '''{{para|small|y}}'''   If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner. Requires explicit definition of the template as applying not to the entire article: {{tnull|trivia|sect{{=}}y|small{{=}}y}} or {{tnull|trivia|table|small{{=}}yes}} or {{tnull|trivia|section{{=}}"In popular culture" material|small{{=}}1}} == Template Data == { "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Please help with the categorization of articles for cleanup by using this parameter.", "type": "unknown", "default": "May 2025", "required": true }, "to": { "label": "Suggested relocation destination", "description": "Location of page or section to which to suggest moving the relevant material" }, "small": { "label": "Make template small", "description": "If given a positive value (y, yes, 1, true), makes the template into a smaller box, instead of a banner." } }, "description": "In accordance with [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)|Wikipedia:Trivia sections]], this template should only be placed at the top of sections that contain ''indiscriminate'' and ''unselective'' lists.", "format": "inline" } == Closely related templates == {{Trivia templates see-also}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (trivia sections)]] * [[Wikipedia:Handling trivia]] – [[WP:Essay|Essay]] on trivia in Wikipedia, what it is and how it should be handled * [[Wikipedia:"In popular culture" content]] – Essay on "popular culture"-types articles and sections * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Trivia Cleanup]] – Wikiproject designed to clean up long lists of trivia in articles * [[:en:Template:Example farm|Template:Example farm]] – For articles or sections with too many examples * [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]] – Index of cleanup templates {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Cleanup templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
